scripts.check: bun run check:public-agent && bun run check:agent-proxy && bun run check:examples && bun run check:proof
scripts.check:agent-proxy: cd services/agent-model-proxy && bun test test/*.test.ts && bunx tsc --noEmit
scripts.check:public-agent: bun test scripts/public-agent-decision.test.ts scripts/github-agent-session.test.ts scripts/github-agent-publish.test.ts scripts/public-agent-triage.test.ts scripts/public-agent-control.test.ts scripts/public-agent-production.test.ts scripts/public-agent-planner.test.ts scripts/public-agent-strategist.test.ts scripts/public-agent-strategy-review.test.ts scripts/agent-visual-verify.test.ts scripts/open-autonomy-fleet.test.ts scripts/open-autonomy-upgrade.test.ts scripts/open-autonomy-proof-audit.test.ts scripts/provision-target-repo.test.ts scripts/testbed-proctor-report.test.ts && bunx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck --moduleResolution Bundler --module ESNext --target ES2022 --types bun scripts/open-autonomy-config.ts scripts/public-agent-bundle.ts scripts/public-agent-decision.ts scripts/github-agent-session.ts scripts/github-agent-publish.ts scripts/model-proxy-mint.ts scripts/model-proxy-exchange.ts scripts/public-agent-strategist.test.ts scripts/public-agent-strategy-review.ts scripts/public-agent-strategy-review.test.ts scripts/public-agent-strategy-ratify.ts scripts/agent-visual-verify.ts scripts/agent-visual-verify.test.ts scripts/public-agent-decision-index.ts scripts/open-autonomy-preflight.ts scripts/open-autonomy-governance-report.ts scripts/open-autonomy-upgrade.ts scripts/open-autonomy-proof-audit.ts scripts/provision-target-repo.ts scripts/provision-target-repo.test.ts scripts/bootstrap-testbed.ts scripts/bootstrap-self-driving-testbed.ts scripts/testbed-proctor-report.ts scripts/testbed-proctor-report.test.ts scripts/public-agent-decision.test.ts scripts/github-agent-session.test.ts scripts/github-agent-publish.test.ts
